message:
🐛 Register workload hooks for mode transition refetch (#2710)

useAllPods, usePodIssues, and useDeploymentIssues were missing
registerRefetch calls, so they didn't re-fetch data when demo
mode was toggled. This caused stale live data to persist after
switching to demo mode.

Fixes #2693

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
